name: 10L Int6 QAT + Per-Dim SmearGate + SWA + Decoupled WD
author: Nathan Maine
blurb: 10 layers with int6 per-row QAT (STE), 3x MLP, per-dim SmearGate, SWA/50 over last 50%, Muon WD 0.038, seq2048, sliding window eval stride=64, zstd-22. NVIDIA Inception member. Brain Trust-informed approach (205K-chunk expert knowledge base consulted).
